title: The DMV in 2025 😪
prompt_text: A brightly lit waiting room, likely a DMV or similar government office, with fluorescent lights on the ceiling and rows of black chairs. A counter with multiple windows labeled 'WINDOWS 1-4' is visible in the background, with a digital display showing a number sequence '066' and later '067'. Several people are seated in the chairs, dressed in casual attire. A woman with light-colored hair and glasses is behind one of the counters.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A brightly lit waiting room, likely a DMV or similar government office, with fluorescent lights on the ceiling and rows of black chairs. A counter with multiple windows labeled 'WINDOWS 1-4' is visible in the background, with a digital display showing a number sequence '066' and later '067'. Several people are seated in the chairs, dressed in casual attire. A woman with light-colored hair and glasses is behind one of the counters.

cinematography.mood: Initially mundane and routine, shifting to celebratory and chaotic.
cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level, static. The camera captures the middle and back of the waiting room.

actions: A man in a yellow hoodie stands in the middle of the waiting room, looking at the digital display.
The man in the yellow hoodie raises his arms excitedly as the number on the display changes from '068' to '067'.
People in the waiting room, including the man in the yellow hoodie, erupt in celebration, jumping up and cheering.
The man in the yellow hoodie walks towards the counter, dancing and pumping his fists.
Other people join in the celebration, some standing on chairs and others running towards the counter.
A woman in a tan top and jeans falls backwards onto the floor, laughing, as the group celebrates around her.
dialogue: Crowd shouts in excitement and cheers.
